title: The Mohamed Model of Human-Centred AI
description: A visual representation of the key principles and their interdependencies in a human-centred AI system, as conceptualized in Module 5.
relationships: Human Needs & Values (Core) drives and is supported by all other elements. Ethical AI Development ensures Explainable & Transparent AI. Transparent systems enable Accountable & Governed AI. All principles combine to create a true Collaborative Human-AI Partnership, which in turn fulfills the core Human Needs & Values.
